alloy: Versatile and balanced neutral voice. Great for general-purpose narration, tutorials, and explainer videos. Has a clear, approachable tone that works across many contexts.
ash: Warm and confident male voice with a conversational style. Ideal for storytelling, product demos, and professional presentations. Feels trustworthy and engaging.
ballad: Soft, melodic, and expressive voice. Perfect for emotional content, poetry readings, artistic narration, and heartfelt brand stories. Evokes sensitivity and grace.
coral: Friendly, bright, and energetic female voice. Excellent for marketing videos, social media content, upbeat product showcases, and youthful brand messaging.
echo: Deep, resonant, and authoritative voice. Best suited for dramatic narration, cinematic trailers, documentary-style content, and luxury brand presentations.
fable: Expressive and dynamic British-accented voice. Ideal for storytelling, audiobooks, educational content, and whimsical or creative narration styles.
nova: Warm, natural, and engaging female voice. A versatile all-rounder perfect for conversational narration, lifestyle content, tech reviews, and everyday explainer videos.
onyx: Deep, rich, and commanding male voice. Suited for serious or formal content such as news-style narration, corporate videos, financial reports, and authoritative presentations.
sage: Calm, wise, and measured voice. Ideal for educational content, meditation guides, science explainers, thoughtful commentary, and wellness-related videos.
shimmer: Light, clear, and uplifting female voice. Perfect for cheerful content, children's media, lifestyle vlogs, recipe videos, and friendly how-to guides.
verse: Expressive and theatrical voice with dynamic range. Great for creative storytelling, animated content, character-driven narration, and artistic or avant-garde projects.
